overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing a driver navigating through rainy urban streets, stopping at bus stops to pick up passengers, and maneuvering through traffic intersections. The scene features wet roads with reflections, active windshield wipers, and European-style city architecture with mixed residential and commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with covered bus stop

events.description: bus slows and stops at the first bus stop to pick up passengers
passengers board through the front door of the bus
bus accelerates away from the bus stop continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: operating the bus through heavy rain, stopping at the designated bus stop to allow passengers to board

notable_agents.action: waiting under the bus stop shelter holding an umbrella
boarding the bus through the front entrance

entered.detail: covered glass and metal bus shelter with yellow frame and bench seating
multi-story brick residential buildings with white window frames
dense green leafy trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a wet residential street lined with trees and brick houses, stopping at a covered bus stop where passengers wait under the shelter. After boarding, the bus departs continuing through the rain-slicked streets.

events.description: bus executes a right turn at the intersection
bus stops at red traffic light behind an orange sedan
traffic light turns green and bus proceeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection, stopping at the red light and proceeding on green

notable_agents.action: orange sedan stopped at the red traffic light ahead of the bus

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal suspended over the intersection
modern glass and concrete office buildings with large facades

segments.scene_description: The bus navigates through an urban intersection, making a right turn and halting at a red traffic light behind an orange car. Upon the signal changing to green, the vehicle proceeds past modern commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with embedded tram tracks

events.description: windshield wipers sweep across the windshield clearing heavy rain
bus overtakes parked vehicles on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the main arterial road, navigating around parked cars

entered.detail: metal tram rails embedded in the asphalt road surface
multi-story residential apartment buildings with balconies
covered bus shelter with passengers visible waiting inside

segments.scene_description: Driving straight along a multi-lane arterial road featuring embedded tram tracks, the bus passes residential apartment blocks and parked cars. Windshield wipers actively clear the heavy rainfall as the vehicle approaches a second bus stop in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with bus stop and storefronts

events.description: bus pulls over and stops at the second bus stop
passengers board the bus including a person wearing a red shirt
bus closes doors and accelerates away from the stop

agents.ego_description: stopping at the designated bus stop to allow passengers to board, then departing

notable_agents.action: passenger in red shirt entering the bus through the front door

entered.detail: ground-level commercial shops with large glass windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a second bus stop located in a commercial area, where passengers including one in a distinctive red shirt board the vehicle. After departure, the bus continues past storefronts and construction barriers along the wet street.

events.description: bus crosses intersection with tram tracks and yield markings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street maintaining speed through the intersection

entered.detail: blue construction fencing and barriers along the sidewalk
older red brick architecture with traditional windows

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the bus drives through an intersection with tram tracks and continues along a street lined with construction barriers and older brick buildings, maintaining steady speed through the persistent heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-soaked city, transitioning from quiet residential neighborhoods to busy commercial districts. It begins by gliding along a wet street lined with brick houses and trees, pausing briefly at a covered shelter for passengers before moving forward. As the bus navigates an urban intersection and halts behind an orange car at a red light, the scenery shifts toward modern commercial buildings upon the signal turning green. The camera then proceeds along a multi-lane arterial road with embedded tram tracks and apartment blocks, with windshield wipers actively clearing heavy rainfall before stopping at a second bus stop where a passenger in a red shirt boards. Finally, the vehicle continues past storefronts and construction barriers, driving through another tram-tracked intersection and past older brick buildings under a persistent downpour.
